---
title: "PlayersPerformance"
format: pdf
---
```{r}

#age vs pts 
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(kableExtra)

playersData <- read.csv("nba-player-stats-2021.csv")

updt_data <-playersData |> filter(pos == 'PG' | pos == 'SG') |> select(player, pos, age, mp, pts, ast, orb, drb, fgpercent, tov) |> filter(mp > 500)



cols <- c("pts", "ast", "orb", "drb", "fgpercent", "tov")

for (colname in cols) {
  updt_data[[colname]] <- round(updt_data[[colname]] / updt_data[["mp"]], 6)
}

updt_data <- head(updt_data, 100)

ggplot(
    data = updt_data,
    mapping = aes(
    x = age,
    y = pts,
    color = pos
  )
) +
geom_point() +
labs(
  x = "Age",
  y = "Points/Minute (pts/min)",
  title = "Age vs Points/Minute",
  color = "Player Position"
)


#age vs assists 


ggplot(
    data = updt_data,
    mapping = aes(
    x = age,
    y = ast,
    color = pos
  )
) +
geom_point() +
labs(
x = "Age",
y = "Assists/Minute (ast/min)",
title = "Age vs Assists/Minute",
color = "Player Position"

)


# age vs orb

ggplot(
    data = updt_data,
    mapping = aes(
    x = age,
    y = orb,
    color = pos
  )
) +
geom_point() +
labs(
x = "Age",
y = "Offensive Rebounds/Minute (orb/min)",
title = "Age vs Offensive Rebounds/Minute",
color = "Player Position"

)

## age vs drb


ggplot(
    data = updt_data,
    mapping = aes(
    x = age,
    y = drb,
    color = pos
  )
) +
geom_point() +
labs(
x = "Age",
y = "Defensive Rebounds/Minute (drb/min)",
title = "Age vs Defensive Rebounds/Minute",
color = "Player Position"

)

## age vs fg percentage 

ggplot(
    data = updt_data,
    mapping = aes(
    x = age,
    y = fgpercent,
    color = pos
  )
) +
geom_point() +
labs(
x = "Age",
y = "FG Percentage/Minute (fg %/min)",
title = "Age vs FG Percentage/Minute",
color = "Player Position"

)

## age vs tov


ggplot(
    data = updt_data,
    mapping = aes(
    x = age,
    y = tov,
    color = pos
  )
) +
geom_point() +
labs(
x = "Age",
y = "Turnovers/Minute (tov/min)",
title = "Age vs Turnovers/Minute",
color = "Player Position"

)

updt_data |> 
  kable() |> 
  kableExtra::kable_classic()


View(updt_data)


```
